╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 Plan: Renderer Styles — Hardcoded Colors to Theme Variables

 Context

 Renderer packages (rich-renderer-*) use @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) and hardcoded hex colors for dark/light mode. This breaks
  when RichRenderer controls theme via theme prop (which applies a Vanilla Extract theme class), not the OS preference. All colors
 must flow from the theme contract CSS variables.

 Core Approach

 1. Switch createThemeContract to createGlobalThemeContract in vars.css.ts — gives all CSS vars predictable names (e.g., --rc-text,
 --rc-bg) instead of hashed ones.
 2. Renderer packages reference var(--rc-*) directly — no cross-package import needed, avoids dependency issues.
 3. Remove all @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) and .dark selectors from renderer styles.

 Variable Name Mapping

 vars.color.text           → --rc-text
 vars.color.textSecondary  → --rc-text-secondary
 vars.color.bg             → --rc-bg
 vars.color.bgSecondary    → --rc-bg-secondary
 vars.color.border         → --rc-border
 vars.color.accent         → --rc-accent
 vars.color.accentLight    → --rc-accent-light
 vars.color.link           → --rc-link
 vars.color.codeText       → --rc-code-text
 vars.color.codeBg         → --rc-code-bg
 vars.color.quoteBorder    → --rc-quote-border
 vars.color.quoteBg        → --rc-quote-bg
 vars.color.alertInfo      → --rc-alert-info
 vars.color.alertWarning   → --rc-alert-warning
 vars.color.alertTip       → --rc-alert-tip
 vars.color.alertCaution   → --rc-alert-caution
 vars.color.alertImportant → --rc-alert-important

 vars.spacing.xs/sm/md/lg/xl  → --rc-space-xs/sm/md/lg/xl
 vars.typography.*             → --rc-font-family, --rc-font-mono, etc.
 vars.borderRadius.*           → --rc-radius-sm/md/lg


 Files to Modify

 1. packages/rich-editor/src/styles/vars.css.ts

 - createThemeContract → createGlobalThemeContract with explicit names
 - All createTheme calls remain unchanged (backward compatible)

 2. packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts

 - Lines 1255-1298: Banner icon colors (#3b82f6 etc.) → vars.color.alertInfo etc.
 - Banner bg/border colors → color-mix(in srgb, ${vars.color.alertXxx} 8%, transparent) / 30%

 3. packages/rich-renderer-alert/src/styles.css.ts

 - Remove alertTypes loop with @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)
 - Set alertColor var to var(--rc-alert-info) etc. per type
 - Replace hover overlay rgba(0,0,0,0.05) → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-text) 5%, transparent)
 - Remove @media block from alertTrigger

 4. packages/rich-renderer-banner/src/styles.css.ts

 - Replace hover bg → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-text) 8%, transparent)
 - Remove @media block

 5. packages/rich-renderer-gallery/src/styles.css.ts

 - galleryNav: border → var(--rc-border), bg → var(--rc-bg-secondary), color → var(--rc-text-secondary)
 - galleryIndicator: bg → var(--rc-text-secondary)
 - Remove all @media blocks

 6. packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/styles.css.ts

 - mermaidEditHint: color → var(--rc-text-secondary), bg → color-mix
 - mermaidLoading: color → var(--rc-text-secondary)
 - mermaidError: color → var(--rc-alert-caution), bg → color-mix(... 10%)
 - modalTextarea: border → var(--rc-border), color → var(--rc-text)
 - modalBtnCancel: color → var(--rc-text-secondary), border → var(--rc-border)
 - modalBtnSave: bg → var(--rc-text), color → var(--rc-bg)
 - Remove all @media blocks

 7. packages/rich-renderer-image/src/styles.css

 - .rr-image-loader: border-color → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-text-secondary) 45%, transparent), border-top-color → color-mix(in
 srgb, var(--rc-text) 65%, transparent)
 - .rr-image-error: color → var(--rc-alert-caution), bg → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-bg) 86%, transparent)
 - .rr-image-caption: color → var(--rc-text-secondary)

 8. packages/rich-renderer-mention/src/styles.css

 - .rich-mention-handle:hover: color → var(--rc-accent)
 - .rich-mention-plain: color → var(--rc-text-secondary)
 - Edit panel fields: bg → var(--rc-bg-secondary), icon color → var(--rc-text-secondary)
 - .rich-mention-edit-action-btn:hover: bg → var(--rc-bg-secondary)
 - Remove entire @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) block

 9. packages/rich-renderer-codeblock/src/styles.css

 - .rr-code-expand-wrap: gradient #fafafa → var(--rc-bg)
 - Remove @media block (dark gradient)

 10. packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/styles.css

 - .link-card: border → var(--rc-border), bg → var(--rc-bg-secondary)
 - .link-card:hover: border → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-border) 80%, var(--rc-text)), bg → var(--rc-bg-secondary)
 - .link-card__image, __icon: bg → var(--rc-bg-secondary)
 - .link-card__icon svg, __external: color → var(--rc-text-secondary)
 - .link-card__desc: color → var(--rc-text-secondary)
 - Skeleton bg → var(--rc-border)
 - Reversed overlay gradient → var(--rc-bg-secondary)
 - Error bg → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-alert-caution) 12%, transparent)
 - Remove entire @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) block

 11. packages/rich-renderer-video/src/styles.css

 - .rr-video-controls: bg → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-bg) 90%, transparent), border → color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-text-secondary)
 20%, transparent), color → var(--rc-text)
 - Progress track/range/thumb → var(--rc-bg), var(--rc-text-secondary) with opacity
 - Remove @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) block
 - Remove .dark / :root.dark blocks

 Hover Overlay Strategy

 For interactive hover backgrounds that were rgba(0,0,0,X) in light and rgba(255,255,255,X) in dark:
 - Use color-mix(in srgb, var(--rc-text) N%, transparent) where N matches the original opacity
 - Works because --rc-text is dark in light theme, light in dark theme

 Verification

 1. pnpm --filter @shiro/rich-editor build — confirm vars.css.ts + shared.css.ts compile
 2. pnpm --filter @shiro/rich-renderer-alert build (and all other renderers)
 3. pnpm --filter @shiro/rich-editor-shiro build — full integration build
 4. Visual check in demo: pnpm --filter @shiro/rich-editor-demo dev — toggle light/dark theme prop

-----
我感觉这样虽然我们实现了功能，但是 DX 大幅下降(css var string)，有没有办法能够更优雅一点去实现这种方式？

import { createVar, globalStyle, style } from '@vanilla-extract/css'

const alertColor = createVar()

export const alertHeader = style({
  display: 'flex',
  alignItems: 'center',
  gap: '8px',
  fontWeight: 600,
  textTransform: 'uppercase',
  letterSpacing: '0.02em',
  fontSize: '0.875rem',
  lineHeight: 1,
  marginBottom: 6,
})

export const alertTrigger = style({
  display: 'inline-flex',
  alignItems: 'center',
  gap: '6px',
  cursor: 'pointer',
  padding: '2px 6px',
  borderRadius: '4px',
  marginInline: '-6px',
  border: 'none',
  background: 'none',
  font: 'inherit',
  fontWeight: 600,
  textTransform: 'uppercase',
  letterSpacing: '0.02em',
  fontSize: '0.875rem',
  lineHeight: 1,
  transition: 'background-color 0.15s',
  selectors: {
    '&:hover': {
      backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',
    },
  },
  '@media': {
    '(prefers-color-scheme: dark)': {
      selectors: {
        '&:hover': {
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)',
        },
      },
    },
  },
})

export const alertChevron = style({
  opacity: 0,
  transition: 'opacity 0.15s',
  width: '14px',
  height: '14px',
  flexShrink: 0,
})

globalStyle(`${alertTrigger}:hover .${alertChevron}`, {
  opacity: 0.6,
})

globalStyle(`${alertTrigger}[data-popup-open] .${alertChevron}`, {
  opacity: 0.8,
})

export const alertIcon = style({
  width: '16px',
  height: '16px',
  flexShrink: 0,
  color: alertColor,
})

export const alertLabel = style({
  color: alertColor,
})

export const alertMenuIcon = style({
  width: '16px',
  height: '16px',
  flexShrink: 0,
})

// Type color assignments via data attributes
const alertTypes = {
  note: { light: '#3b82f6', dark: '#60a5fa' },
  tip: { light: '#22c55e', dark: '#4ade80' },
  important: { light: '#a855f7', dark: '#c084fc' },
  warning: { light: '#f59e0b', dark: '#fbbf24' },
  caution: { light: '#ef4444', dark: '#f87171' },
} as const

for (const [type, colors] of Object.entries(alertTypes)) {
  globalStyle(`[data-alert-type='${type}']`, {
    vars: { [alertColor]: colors.light },
    '@media': {
      '(prefers-color-scheme: dark)': {
        vars: { [alertColor]: colors.dark },
      },
    },
  })
}

.rich-mention {

/* ─── Card ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.rr-code-card {
  --rr-code-accent: #737373;
  position: relative;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-size: 14px;
}

/* ─── Language label (bottom-right) ────────────────────── */

.rr-code-lang {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0.75rem;
  right: 0.75rem;
  z-index: 2;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  opacity: 0.6;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* ─── Copy button (top-right, hover reveal) ────────────── */

.rr-code-copy {
  appearance: none;
  position: absolute;
  right: 0.5rem;
  top: 0.5rem;
  z-index: 3;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.375rem;
  border-radius: 0.375rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--rr-code-accent) 5%, transparent);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rr-code-accent) 80%, transparent);
  color: white;
  cursor: pointer;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}

.rr-code-card:hover .rr-code-copy {
  opacity: 1;
}

/* ─── Body background ──────────────────────────────────── */

.rr-code-bg {
  position: relative;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rr-code-accent) 5%, transparent);
  padding: 1rem 0;
}

/* ─── Scroll container ─────────────────────────────────── */

.rr-code-scroll {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
}

.rr-code-scroll-collapsed {
  max-height: 50vh;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* ─── Code body (shikicode host) ───────────────────────── */

.rr-code-body {
  position: relative;
  overflow: auto;
  background-color: transparent !important;
}

.rr-code-body > .shikicode.output {
  position: static !important;
  inset: auto !important;
}

.rr-code-readonly > textarea.shikicode {
  display: none;
}

/* ─── Expand ───────────────────────────────────────────── */

.rr-code-expand-wrap {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 0 0.75rem;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0%, var(--bg, #fafafa) 80%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.rr-code-expand {
  appearance: none;
  border: none;
  background: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: inherit;
  opacity: 0.7;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.rr-code-expand:hover {
  opacity: 1;
}

/* ─── Shiki output overrides ───────────────────────────── */

.rr-code-card pre {
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0;
  font-size: min(1em, 16px);
}

.rr-code-card pre code {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.rr-code-card .shiki,
.rr-code-card code,
.rr-code-card pre {
  background: transparent !important;
}

.rr-code-card .shikicode.output .line::before {
  background-color: transparent !important;
}

.rr-code-card .line {
  display: block;
  padding: 0 1.25rem;
}

.rr-code-card .shikicode.input.line-numbers {
  padding-left: calc(5em + 1.25rem);
}

.rr-code-card .shikicode.input:not(.line-numbers) {
  padding-left: 1.25rem;
}

.rr-code-card .line > span:last-child {
  margin-right: 1.25rem;
}

.rr-code-card .line::after {
  content: ' ';
}

/* ─── Highlighted / Diff lines ─────────────────────────── */

.rr-code-card .highlighted,
.rr-code-card .diff {
  position: relative;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
}

.rr-code-card .highlighted::before,
.rr-code-card .diff::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  height: 100%;
  width: 2px;
}

.rr-code-card .highlighted {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rr-code-accent) 20%, transparent);
}

.rr-code-card .highlighted::before {
  background: var(--rr-code-accent);
}

.rr-code-card .diff.add {
  background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15);
}

.rr-code-card .diff.add::before {
  background: #22c55e;
}

.rr-code-card .diff.add::after {
  content: ' +';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: #22c55e;
}

.rr-code-card .diff.remove {
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15);
}

.rr-code-card .diff.remove::before {
  background: #ef4444;
}

.rr-code-card .diff.remove::after {
  content: ' -';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: #ef4444;
}

/* ─── Scrollbar ───────────────────────────────────�

/* LinkCard Base */
.link-card {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  width: 32rem;
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 1.25rem auto;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  text-indent: 0;
  font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  border: 1px solid #e5e5e5cc;
  background-color: #fafafacc;
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(150%);
  transition:
    border-color 0.2s,
    background-color 0.2s;
}

.link-card:hover {
  border-color: #d4d4d4;
  background-color: #f0f0f0;
}

.link-card * {
  font-style: normal !important;
}

.link-card span {
  border-bottom: 0 !important;
}

/* Background overlay (colored tint from plugin) */
.link-card__bg {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Left icon/avatar */
.link-card__image {
  position: relative;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 2.5rem;
  height: 2.5rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-color: #f0f0f0;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* Fallback icon container (no plugin image) */
.link-card__icon {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 2.5rem;
  height: 2.5rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  background-color: #f0f0f0;
  z-index: 1;
}

.link-card__icon img {
  width: 1.25rem;
  height: 1.25rem;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
}

.link-card__icon svg {
  width: 1.25rem;
  height: 1.25rem;
  color: #a3a3a3;
}

/* Content area */
.link-card__content {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

/* Title row */
.link-card__title {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  line-height: 1.25rem;
}

.link-card__title-text {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.25rem;
}

/* External link icon */
.link-card__external {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-left: auto;
  width: 0.875rem;
  height: 0.875rem;
  color: #a3a3a3;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.link-card:hover .link-card__external {
  opacity: 1;
}

/* Description */
.link-card__desc {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  margin-top: 0.375rem;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: #737373;
  min-width: 0;
}

/* Favicon (inline in title, backward compat) */
.link-card__favicon {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 1rem;
  height: 1rem;
  display: inline;
  vertical-align: middle;
  margin-right: 0.375rem;
}

/* ─── Poster image modifiers ─── */

.link-card__image--poster {
  width: 6.25rem !important;

}

.rr-video-root {
  margin: 1.25rem 0;
}

.rr-video-player {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  background: #000;
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.rr-video-element {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  display: block;
  object-fit: contain;
  background: #000;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* Click indicator — scale up & fade out */
.rr-video-indicator {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  margin: auto;
  width: 5rem;
  height: 5rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
  color: #fff;
  pointer-events: none;
  animation: rr-video-indicator-flash 0.5s ease forwards;
}

@keyframes rr-video-indicator-flash {
  0% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
  100% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(1.3);
  }
}

/* Control bar — glassmorphism pill */
.rr-video-controls {
  position: absolute;
  left: 2rem;
  right: 2rem;
  bottom: 0.5rem;
  height: 2.5rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(161, 161, 170, 0.2);
  background: rgba(244, 244, 245, 0.9);
  backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(180%);
  color: #3f3f46;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  padding: 0 1rem;
  max-width: 80vw;
  margin: 0 auto;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(4px);
  transition:
    opacity 0.2s ease,
    transform 0.2s ease;
}

.rr-video-player:hover .rr-video-controls,
.rr-video-player:focus-within .rr-video-controls {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* Dark mode — prefers-color-scheme */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  .rr-video-controls {
    background: rgba(64, 64, 64, 0.9);
    border-color: transparent;
    color: #e4e4e7;
  }

  .rr-video-progress-track {
    background: #262626;
  }

  .rr-video-progress-range {
    background: #525252;
  }

  .rr-video-progress-thumb {
    background: #a1a1aa;
  }
}

/* Dark mode — .dark class on ancestor */
.dark .rr-video-controls,
:root.dark .rr-video-controls {
  background: rgba(64, 64, 64, 0.9);
  border-color: transparent;
  color: #e4e4e7;
}

.dark .rr-video-progress-track,
:root.dark .rr-video-progress-track {
  background: #262626;
}

.dark .rr-video-progress-range,
:root.dark .rr-video-progress-range {
  background: #525252;
}

.dark .rr-video-progress-thumb,
:root.dark .rr-video-progress-thumb {
  background: #a1a1aa;
}

/* Buttons — transparent, scale on hover */
.rr-video-btn {
  appearance: none;
  border: none;
  background: none;
  color: inherit;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0.125rem;
  line-height: 1;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: transform 0.15s ease;
}

.rr-video-btn:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

.rr-video-btn:active {
  transform: scale(0.93);
}

.rr-video-btn:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid currentColor;
  outline-offset: 2px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.rr-video-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.5;
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* Progress bar */
.rr-video-progress {
  flex: 1;
  height: 100%;
}

.rr-video-progress-control {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  touch-action: none;
  user-select: none;
}

.rr-video-progress-track {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  height: 0.25rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #fff;
}

.rr-video-progress-range {
  position: absolute;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(113, 113, 122, 0.4);
}

.rr-video-progress-thumb {
  display: block;
  height: 0.75rem;
  width: 3px;
  border-radius: 1px;
  border: none;
  background: #71717a;
}

/* Spinner */
.rr-video-spin {
  animation: rr-video-spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes rr-video-spin {
  from {
    transform: rotate(0deg);
  }
  to {
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .rr-video-controls {
    left: 0.75rem;
    right: 0.75rem;
    opacity: 1;
    transform: none;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0 0.75rem;
  }
}

import type { AlertRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import type { LucideProps } from 'lucide-react'
import {
  Info,
  Lightbulb,
  MessageSquareWarning,
  OctagonAlert,
  TriangleAlert,
} from 'lucide-react'
import type { FC } from 'react'

import * as css from './styles.css'

type AlertType = AlertRendererProps['type']

export const ALERT_ICONS: Record<AlertType, FC<LucideProps>> = {
  note: Info,
  tip: Lightbulb,
  important: MessageSquareWarning,
  warning: TriangleAlert,
  caution: OctagonAlert,
}

export const ALERT_LABELS: Record<AlertType, string> = {
  note: 'Note',
  tip: 'Tip',
  important: 'Important',
  warning: 'Warning',
  caution: 'Caution',
}

export const ALERT_COLORS: Record<AlertType, string> = {
  note: '#3b82f6',
  tip: '#22c55e',
  important: '#a855f7',
  warning: '#f59e0b',
  caution: '#ef4444',
}

export const ALL_TYPES: AlertType[] = [
  'note',
  'tip',
  'important',
  'warning',
  'caution',
]

export const AlertRenderer: FC<AlertRendererProps> = ({ type }) => {
  const Icon = ALERT_ICONS[type]
  const label = ALERT_LABELS[type]

  return (
    <div className={css.alertHeader} data-alert-type={type}>
      <Icon className={css.alertIcon} />
      <span className={css.alertLabel}>{label}</span>
    </div>
  )
}

export default AlertRenderer
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { BannerRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import type { LucideProps } from 'lucide-react'
import {
  Info,
  Lightbulb,
  MessageSquareWarning,
  OctagonAlert,
  TriangleAlert,
} from 'lucide-react'
import type { FC } from 'react'

type BannerType = BannerRendererProps['type']

export const BANNER_ICONS: Record<BannerType, FC<LucideProps>> = {
  note: Info,
  tip: Lightbulb,
  important: MessageSquareWarning,
  warning: TriangleAlert,
  caution: OctagonAlert,
}

export const BANNER_LABELS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
  note: 'Note',
  tip: 'Tip',
  important: 'Important',
  warning: 'Warning',
  caution: 'Caution',
}

export const BANNER_COLORS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
  note: '#3b82f6',
  tip: '#22c55e',
  important: '#a855f7',
  warning: '#f59e0b',
  caution: '#ef4444',
}

export const ALL_TYPES: BannerType[] = [
  'note',
  'tip',
  'important',
  'warning',
  'caution',
]

export const BannerRenderer: FC<BannerRendererProps> = ({ type }) => {
  const Icon = BANNER_ICONS[type]
  return (
    <span className={`rich-banner-icon rich-banner-icon-${type}`}>
      <Icon width="1em" height="1em" />
    </span>
  )
}

export default BannerRenderer

import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'

import { allNodes } from '../config'
import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
import { HeadingAnchorPlugin } from '../plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin'
import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
import type { RichRendererProps } from '../types'
import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'

export function RichRenderer({
  value,
  variant = 'article',
  theme = 'light',
  className,
  as: Component = 'div',
  rendererConfig,
  extraNodes,
}: RichRendererProps) {
  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)

  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes

  const initialConfig = {
    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    theme: editorTheme,
    nodes,
    editable: false,
    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
    },
  }

  return (
    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
        <RendererConfigProvider config={rendererConfig} mode="renderer">
          <Component className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)}>
            <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
              <RichTextPlugin
                contentEditable={
                  <ContentEditable
                    className="rich-content__body"
                    style={{ outline: 'none' }}
                    aria-placeholder=""
                    placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
                  />
                }
                ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
              />
              <HeadingAnchorPlugin />
            </LexicalComposer>
          </Component>
        </RendererConfigProvider>
      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    </PortalThemeProvider>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

Output:
import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
import { HistoryPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalHistoryPlugin'
import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
import { TabIndentationPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalTabIndentationPlugin'
import { TablePlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalTablePlugin'
import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'

import { allEditNodes } from '../config-edit'
import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
import { AlertPlugin } from '../plugins/AlertPlugin'
import { AutoFocusPlugin } from '../plugins/AutoFocusPlugin'
import { AutoLinkPlugin } from '../plugins/AutoLinkPlugin'
import { ComponentPlugin } from '../plugins/ComponentPlugin'
import { EditorRefPlugin } from '../plugins/EditorRefPlugin'
import { ImagePlugin } from '../plugins/ImagePlugin'
import { KaTeXPlugin } from '../plugins/KaTeXPlugin'
import { MarkdownShortcutsPlugin } from '../plugins/MarkdownShortcutsPlugin'
import { MermaidPlugin } from '../plugins/MermaidPlugin'
import { OnChangePlugin } from '../plugins/OnChangePlugin'
import { SubmitShortcutPlugin } from '../plugins/SubmitShortcutPlugin'
import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
import type { RichEditorProps } from '../types'
import { ContentEditable } from './ContentEditable'
import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'

export function RichEditor({
  initialValue,
  onChange,
  variant = 'article',
  theme = 'light',
  placeholder = 'Write something...',
  onSubmit,
  autoFocus = false,
  className,
  contentClassName,
  actions,
  onEditorReady,
  extraNodes,
  rendererConfig,
  debounceMs,
  children,
}: RichEditorProps) {
  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allEditNodes, ...extraNodes] : allEditNodes
  const initialConfig = {
    namespace: 'RichEditor',
    theme: editorTheme,
    nodes,
    editable: true,
    onError: (error: Error) => {
      console.error('[RichEditor]', error)
    },
    ...(initialValue ? { editorState: JSON.stringify(initialValue) } : {}),
  }

  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)

  return (
    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
        <RendererConfigProvider config={rendererConfig} mode="editor">
          <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
            <div className={clsx('rich-editor', variantClass, className)}>
              <RichTextPlugin
                contentEditable={
                  <ContentEditable
                    className={contentClassName}
                    placeholder={placeholder}
                  />
                }
                ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
              />
              <HistoryPlugin />
              <ListPlugin />
              <LinkPlugin />
              <TabIndentationPlugin />
              <TablePlugin />
              <MarkdownShortcutsPlugin />
              <OnChangePlugin onChange={onChange} debounceMs={debounceMs} />
              <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />
              <ImagePlugin />
              <KaTeXPlugin />
              <AlertPlugin />
              <MermaidPlugin />
              <ComponentPlugin />
              <AutoLinkPlugin />
              <EditorRefPlugin onEditorReady={onEditorReady} />
              {autoFocus && <AutoFocusPlugin />}
              {children}
              {actions && <div className="rich-editor__actions">{actions}</div>}
            </div>
          </LexicalComposer>
        </RendererConfigProvider>
      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    </PortalThemeProvider>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { ColorScheme } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
import { articleVariant, darkArticleVariant } from '../styles/article.css'
import { commentVariant, darkCommentVariant } from '../styles/comment.css'
import { darkNoteVariant, noteVariant } from '../styles/note.css'
import type { RichEditorVariant } from '../types'

export function clsx(
  ...args: Array<string | undefined | null | false>
): string {
  return args.filter(Boolean).join(' ')
}

export function getVariantClass(
  variant: RichEditorVariant,
  colorScheme: ColorScheme,
): string {
  if (variant === 'comment') {
    return colorScheme === 'dark' ? darkCommentVariant : commentVariant
  }
  if (variant === 'note') {
    return colorScheme === 'dark' ? darkNoteVariant : noteVariant
  }
  return colorScheme === 'dark' ? darkArticleVariant : articleVariant
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import { globalStyle, style } from '@vanilla-extract/css'

import { richContent } from './shared.css'
import { articleTheme, darkArticleTheme, vars } from './vars.css'

// Helper for em calculation (based on 18px base)
const em = (target: number, context = 18) => `${target / context}em`
const round = (num: number) => num.toFixed(7).replace(/(\.\d+?)0+$/, '$1')

// Prose LG values from Tailwind Typography
// Base font size: 18px

const articleBase = style({
  maxWidth: '65ch',
  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeLarge, // 18px
  lineHeight: round(32 / 18), // 1.7777778
  color: vars.color.text,
})

  richContent,
  darkArticleTheme,
  articleBase,
])

  marginTop: em(24, 18),

})

import type { AlertRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'
import { ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react'
import type { FC } from 'react'

import {
  ALERT_COLORS,
  ALERT_ICONS,
  ALERT_LABELS,
  AlertRenderer,
  ALL_TYPES,
} from './AlertRenderer'
import * as css from './styles.css'

export const AlertEditRenderer: FC<AlertRendererProps> = ({
  type,
  editable,
  onTypeChange,
}) => {
  if (!editable || !onTypeChange) {
    return <AlertRenderer type={type} />
  }

  const Icon = ALERT_ICONS[type]
  const label = ALERT_LABELS[type]

  return (
    <div className={css.alertHeader} data-alert-type={type}>
      <DropdownMenu>
        <DropdownMenuTrigger className={css.alertTrigger}>
          <Icon className={css.alertIcon} />
          <span className={css.alertLabel}>{label}</span>
          <ChevronDown className={css.alertChevron} />
        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
        <DropdownMenuContent sideOffset={6} align="start">
          {ALL_TYPES.map((t) => {
            const ItemIcon = ALERT_ICONS[t]
            return (
              <DropdownMenuItem
                key={t}
                data-alert-type={t}
                onClick={() => onTypeChange(t)}
              >
                <ItemIcon
                  className={css.alertMenuIcon}
                  style={{ color: ALERT_COLORS[t] }}
                />
                <span>{ALERT_LABELS[t]}</span>
              </DropdownMenuItem>
            )
          })}
        </DropdownMenuContent>
      </DropdownMenu>
    </div>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { BannerRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'
import type { FC } from 'react'

import {
  ALL_TYPES,
  BANNER_COLORS,
  BANNER_ICONS,
  BANNER_LABELS,
  BannerRenderer,
} from './BannerRenderer'
import * as css from './styles.css'

export const BannerEditRenderer: FC<BannerRendererProps> = ({
  type,
  editable,
  onTypeChange,
}) => {
  if (!editable || !onTypeChange) {
    return <BannerRenderer type={type} />
  }

  const Icon = BANNER_ICONS[type]

  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger
        className={`${css.bannerTrigger} rich-banner-icon rich-banner-icon-${type}`}
      >
        <Icon width="1em" height="1em" />
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent sideOffset={6} align="start">
        {ALL_TYPES.map((t) => {
          const ItemIcon = BANNER_ICONS[t]
          return (
            <DropdownMenuItem
              key={t}
              data-banner-type={t}
              onClick={() => onTypeChange(t)}
            >
              <ItemIcon
                className={css.bannerMenuIcon}
                style={{ color: BANNER_COLORS[t] }}
              />
              <span>{BANNER_LABELS[t]}</span>
            </DropdownMenuItem>
          )
        })}
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'

type PortalThemeContextType = {
  className: string
}

const PortalThemeContext = createContext<PortalThemeContextType>({
  className: '',
})

export function PortalThemeProvider({
  className,
  children,
}: {
  className: string
  children?: ReactNode
}) {
  return (
    <PortalThemeContext.Provider
      value={useMemo(() => ({ className }), [className])}
    >
      {children}
    </PortalThemeContext.Provider>
  )
}

export function usePortalTheme() {
  return use(PortalThemeContext)
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import { Menu as MenuPrimitive } from '@base-ui/react/menu'
import { Check } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ComponentProps, ReactNode } from 'react'

import { usePortalTheme } from '../../context/portal-theme'
import * as css from './styles.css'

// -- Root --

type DropdownMenuProps = ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Root>

export function DropdownMenu(props: DropdownMenuProps) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.Root {...props} />
}

// -- Trigger --

type DropdownMenuTriggerProps = ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Trigger>

export function DropdownMenuTrigger(props: DropdownMenuTriggerProps) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.Trigger {...props} />
}

// -- Portal --

function DropdownMenuPortal({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  const { className } = usePortalTheme()
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.Portal>
      {className ? <div className={className}>{children}</div> : children}
    </MenuPrimitive.Portal>
  )
}

// -- Content (Portal + Positioner + Popup) --

type DropdownMenuContentProps = Omit<
  ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Popup>,
  'render'
> & {
  align?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['align']
  alignOffset?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['alignOffset']
  side?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['side']
  sideOffset?: ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Positioner>['sideOffset']
  className?: string
  children?: ReactNode
}

export function DropdownMenuContent({
  align = 'start',
  alignOffset = 0,
  side = 'bottom',
  sideOffset = 4,
  className,
  children,
  ...popupProps
}: DropdownMenuContentProps) {
  return (
    <DropdownMenuPortal>
      <MenuPrimitive.Positioner
        align={align}
        alignOffset={alignOffset}
        side={side}
        sideOffset={sideOffset}
      >
        <MenuPrimitive.Popup
          className={`${css.popup}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
          {...popupProps}
        >
          {children}
        </MenuPrimitive.Popup>
      </MenuPrimitive.Positioner>
    </DropdownMenuPortal>
  )
}

// -- Group --

type DropdownMenuGroupProps = ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Group>

export function DropdownMenuGroup(props: DropdownMenuGroupProps) {
  return <MenuPrimitive.Group {...props} />
}

// -- GroupLabel --

type DropdownMenuLabelProps = ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.GroupLabel>

export function DropdownMenuLabel({
  className,
  ...props
}: DropdownMenuLabelProps) {
  return (
    <MenuPrimitive.GroupLabel
      className={`${css.label}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

// -- Item --

type DropdownMenuItemProps = ComponentProps<typeof MenuPrimitive.Item> & {
  className?: string
}

export function DropdownMenuItem({
  className,

}: DropdownMenuItemProps) {
  return (

  return (

      {...props}
    />
  )
}

// -- RadioGroup --

type DropdownMenuRadioGroupProps = ComponentProps<

>

export function DropdownMenuRadioGroup(props: DropdownMenuRadioGroupProps) {

import { Dialog as DialogPrimitive } from '@base-ui/react/dialog'
import { X } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ComponentProps, ReactNode } from 'react'

import { usePortalTheme } from '../../context/portal-theme'
import * as css from './styles.css'

// -- Dialog Root --

type DialogProps = ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Root>

export function Dialog(props: DialogProps) {
  return <DialogPrimitive.Root {...props} />
}

// -- Trigger --

type DialogTriggerProps = ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Trigger>

export function DialogTrigger(props: DialogTriggerProps) {
  return <DialogPrimitive.Trigger {...props} />
}

// -- Portal --

type DialogPortalProps = ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Portal>

export function DialogPortal({ children, ...props }: DialogPortalProps) {
  const { className } = usePortalTheme()
  return (
    <DialogPrimitive.Portal {...props}>
      {className ? <div className={className}>{children}</div> : children}
    </DialogPrimitive.Portal>
  )
}

// -- Backdrop --

type DialogBackdropProps = ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Backdrop>

export function DialogBackdrop({ className, ...props }: DialogBackdropProps) {
  return (
    <DialogPrimitive.Backdrop
      className={`${css.backdrop}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

// -- Popup --

type DialogPopupProps = ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Popup> & {
  showCloseButton?: boolean
  className?: string
  children?: ReactNode
}

export function DialogPopup({
  showCloseButton = true,
  className,
  children,
  ...props
}: DialogPopupProps) {
  return (
    <DialogPortal>
      <DialogBackdrop />
      <DialogPrimitive.Popup
        className={`${css.popup}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
        {...props}
      >
        {children}
        {showCloseButton && (
          <DialogPrimitive.Close className={css.closeButton}>
            <X />
          </DialogPrimitive.Close>
        )}
      </DialogPrimitive.Popup>
    </DialogPortal>
  )
}

  return <DialogPrimitive.Close {...props} />
}

    />

      {...props}
    />
  )
}

type DialogDescriptionProps = ComponentProps<typeof DialogPrimitive.Description>

export function DialogDescription({

}: DialogDescriptionProps) {

      {...props}

}

import { Popover as PopoverPrimitive } from '@base-ui/react/popover'
import type { ComponentProps, ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'

import { usePortalTheme } from '../../context/portal-theme'
import { getStrictContext } from '../../lib/get-strict-context'
import * as css from './styles.css'

// -- Context --

type PopoverContextType = {
  isOpen: boolean
}

const [PopoverProvider, usePopover] =
  getStrictContext<PopoverContextType>('PopoverContext')

export { usePopover }

// -- Root --

type PopoverProps = ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Root>

export function Popover(props: PopoverProps) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(props?.defaultOpen ?? false)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (props.open !== undefined) setIsOpen(props.open)
  }, [props.open])

  const handleOpenChange: PopoverProps['onOpenChange'] = (open, details) => {
    setIsOpen(open)
    props.onOpenChange?.(open, details)
  }

  return (
    <PopoverProvider value={{ isOpen }}>
      <PopoverPrimitive.Root {...props} onOpenChange={handleOpenChange} />
    </PopoverProvider>
  )
}

// -- Trigger --

type PopoverTriggerProps = ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Trigger>

export function PopoverTrigger(props: PopoverTriggerProps) {
  return <PopoverPrimitive.Trigger {...props} />
}

// -- Portal --

type PopoverPortalProps = ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Portal>

export function PopoverPortal({ children, ...props }: PopoverPortalProps) {
  const { className } = usePortalTheme()
  return (
    <PopoverPrimitive.Portal {...props}>
      {className ? <div className={className}>{children}</div> : children}
    </PopoverPrimitive.Portal>
  )
}

// -- Positioner --

type PopoverPositionerProps = ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Positioner>

export function PopoverPositioner(props: PopoverPositionerProps) {
  return <PopoverPrimitive.Positioner {...props} />
}

// -- Popup (panel) --

type PopoverPopupProps = Omit<
  ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Popup>,
  'render'
> & {
  className?: string
  children?: ReactNode
}

export function PopoverPopup({
  className,
  children,
  ...props
}: PopoverPopupProps) {
  return (
    <PopoverPrimitive.Popup
      className={`${css.popup}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
      {...props}
    >
      {children}
    </PopoverPrimitive.Popup>
  )
}

// -- Panel (= Positioner + Popup convenience wrapper) --

type PopoverPanelProps = PopoverPopupProps & {
  align?: PopoverPositionerProps['align']
  side?: PopoverPositionerProps['side']
  sideOffset?: PopoverPositionerProps['sideOffset']
}

export function PopoverPanel({
  align = 'center',
  side,
  sideOffset = 4,
  className,
  children,
  ...popupProps
}: PopoverPanelProps) {
  return (
    <PopoverPortal>
      <PopoverPositioner align={align} side={side} sideOffset={sideOffset}>
        <PopoverPopup className={className} {...popupProps}>
          {children}
        </PopoverPopup>
      </PopoverPositioner>
    </PopoverPortal>
  )
}

// -- Arrow --

type PopoverArrowProps = ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Arrow>

export function PopoverArrow({ className, ...props }: PopoverArrowProps) {
  return (
    <PopoverPrimitive.Arrow
      className={`${css.arrow}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

// -- Close --

type PopoverCloseProps = ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Close>

export function PopoverClose(props: PopoverCloseProps) {
  return <PopoverPrimitive.Close {...props} />
}

// -- Title / Description --

type PopoverTitleProps = ComponentProps<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Title>

export function PopoverTitle({ className, ...props }: PopoverTitleProps) {
  return (
    <PopoverPrimitive.Title
      className={`${css.title}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

type PopoverDescriptionProps = ComponentProps<
  typeof PopoverPrimitive.Description
>

export function PopoverDescription({
  className,
  ...props
}: PopoverDescriptionProps) {
  return (
    <PopoverPrimitive.Description
      className={`${css.description}${className ? ` ${className}` : ''}`}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export type {
  PopoverArrowProps,
  PopoverCloseProps,
  PopoverDescriptionProps,
  PopoverPanelProps,
  PopoverPopupProps,
  PopoverPortalProps,
  PopoverPositionerProps,
  PopoverProps,
  PopoverTitleProps,
  PopoverTriggerProps,
}

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:18:25Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Designing improved theme token strategy**
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:18:33Z)**_

**Findings**
1. [High] 计划有遗漏，`Alert/Banner` 的编辑下拉项仍是硬编码颜色，不会随主题变量走。见 `packages/rich-renderer-alert/src/AlertRenderer.tsx:32`、`packages/rich-renderer-alert/src/AlertEditRenderer.tsx:51`、`packages/rich-renderer-banner/src/BannerRenderer.tsx:30`、`packages/rich-renderer-banner/src/BannerEditRenderer.tsx:48`。
2. [Medium] “renderer 全部用 `var(--rc-*)` 字符串且不跨包 import”这条过于保守，会明显拉低 DX。因为 renderer 本来就依赖 `@shiro/rich-editor`（如 `packages/rich-renderer-alert/package.json:35`、`packages/rich-renderer-banner/package.json:35`），而 `vars` 也已从 `rich-editor` 导出（`packages/rich-editor/src/styles/index.ts:6`）。
3. [Medium] 方案没有定义“缺少主题变量时”的降级策略。改完后如果组件脱离主题类使用，像 `packages/rich-renderer-video/src/styles.css:59` 这类位置会出现不可预期样式。

**更优雅方案（推荐）**
1. 保留 `createThemeContract`（`packages/rich-editor/src/styles/vars.css.ts:1`）作为内部 typed contract，不必强制切到 `createGlobalThemeContract`。
2. 在 `rich-editor` 增加一层“public token bridge”（统一暴露 `--rc-*`），只在这里做一次映射。
3. `*.css.ts` 的 renderer 继续走 typed token（import contract/bridge 常量），避免到处写裸字符串。
4. 纯 `*.css` 文件只在组件根部定义少量局部别名变量，再在内部复用，减少 `var(--rc-*)` 噪音。
5. 把 `ALERT_COLORS/BANNER_COLORS` 改为基于 token 的映射或 data-attribute + CSS var，消除 TSX 内联硬编码。

**结论**
有办法做到“主题正确 + DX 不降太多”：用“typed contract + public bridge + 局部别名”三层结构，比“全量手写 `var(--rc-*)`”更干净。若你愿意，我可以按这个思路给你整理一版可直接执行的改造顺序。

---

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:21:02Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="exec_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **exec_command** `sed -n '1,180p' packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts`</summary>
```
Chunk ID: 715826

Output:
import { globalStyle, keyframes, style } from '@vanilla-extract/css'

import { vars } from './vars.css'

export const richContent = style({
  fontFamily: vars.typography.fontFamily,
  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeBase,
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeight,
  color: vars.color.text,
  wordWrap: 'break-word',
  overflowWrap: 'break-word',
})

// ─── Paragraphs ──────────────────────────────────────────
globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-paragraph`, {
  margin: 0,
  marginBottom: '1em',
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeight,
})

// ─── Inline text formats ─────────────────────────────────
globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-text-bold`, {
  fontWeight: 700,
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-text-italic`, {
  fontStyle: 'italic',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-text-underline`, {
  textDecoration: 'underline',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-text-strikethrough`, {
  textDecoration: 'line-through',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-text-highlight`, {
  backgroundColor: vars.color.accentLight,
  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.sm,
  padding: '1px 4px',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-text-code`, {
  fontFamily: vars.typography.fontMono,
  fontSize: '0.9em',
  backgroundColor: vars.color.codeBg,
  color: vars.color.codeText,
  padding: '2px 6px',
  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.sm,
  border: `1px solid ${vars.color.border}`,
})

// ─── Headings (base) ─────────────────────────────────────

const headingSelector = `:is(.rich-heading-h1, .rich-heading-h2, .rich-heading-h3, .rich-heading-h4, .rich-heading-h5, .rich-heading-h6)`

globalStyle(`${richContent} ${headingSelector}`, {
  position: 'relative',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-anchor`, {
  position: 'absolute',
  left: '-1.25em',
  top: 0,
  bottom: 0,
  display: 'flex',
  alignItems: 'center',
  textDecoration: 'none',
  color: vars.color.textSecondary,
  opacity: 0,
  transition: 'opacity 0.15s ease',
  fontSize: '0.8em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-anchor::before`, {
  content: '"#"',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} ${headingSelector}:hover .rich-heading-anchor`, {
  opacity: 0.5,
})

globalStyle(
  `${richContent} ${headingSelector}:hover .rich-heading-anchor:hover`,
  {
    opacity: 1,
  },
)

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-h1`, {
  fontSize: '2em',
  fontWeight: 700,
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeightTight,
  marginTop: '1.5em',
  marginBottom: '0.5em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-h2`, {
  fontSize: '1.5em',
  fontWeight: 700,
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeightTight,
  marginTop: '1.4em',
  marginBottom: '0.45em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-h3`, {
  fontSize: '1.25em',

  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeightTight,
  marginTop: '1.3em',
  marginBottom: '0.4em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-h4`, {
  fontSize: '1.125em',
  fontWeight: 600,
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeightTight,
  marginTop: '1.2em',
  marginBottom: '0.35em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-h5`, {
  fontSize: '1em',
  fontWeight: 600,
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeightTight,
  marginTop: '1.1em',
  marginBottom: '0.3em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-heading-h6`, {
  fontSize: '0.875em',
  fontWeight: 600,
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeightTight,
  marginTop: '1em',
  marginBottom: '0.25em',
  color: vars.color.textSecondary,
})

// ─── Links ───────────────────────────────────────────────
globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-link`, {
  color: vars.color.link,
  textDecoration: 'none',
  transition: 'color 0.2s ease',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-link:hover`, {
  textDecoration: 'underline',
})

// ─── Lists ───────────────────────────────────────────────

  listStyleType: 'decimal',
  paddingLeft: vars.spacing.lg,
  marginBottom: '1em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-list-ul`, {

  marginBottom: '1em',
})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-list-item`, {

})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-list-nested-item`, {

})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-list-nested-item .rich-list-ol`, {

})

globalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-list-nested-item .rich-list-ul`, {

})

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:21:30Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Outlining layered CSS token strategy**
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:21:34Z)**_

思路是做“三层”，把主题能力和 DX 分开处理，不走全量裸字符串。

1. 保留 `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/vars.css.ts` 的 typed contract（`vars.color.xxx`），不要把业务代码都改成 `var(--rc-*)`。
2. 在 `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts` 做一层 bridge：把 `vars.color.*` 映射到稳定别名 `--rc-*`（只做一次）。
3. 在 `packages/rich-editor/src/styles` 增加一个导出文件（比如 `public-tokens.ts`），统一导出 `rcTokens`（如 `rcTokens.color.text = 'var(--rc-text)'`），renderer 不手写字符串。
4. `*.css.ts` renderer（alert/banner/gallery/mermaid）直接用 typed token（`vars` 或 `rcTokens`）；`*.css` renderer（image/mention/codeblock/linkcard/video）只在根类定义局部别名 `--rr-* = var(--rc-*, fallback)`，内部都用 `--rr-*`，可读性高。
5. `Alert/Banner` 的编辑菜单颜色不要再用 `ALERT_COLORS/BANNER_COLORS` 硬编码，改成 `data-*` + CSS var 映射（`packages/rich-renderer-alert/src/AlertRenderer.tsx`、`packages/rich-renderer-banner/src/BannerRenderer.tsx`）。
6. 全量移除 `prefers-color-scheme` / `.dark`，以 theme class 为唯一来源。

这套方式的关键是：主题切换正确、跨包可用、并且大部分代码仍是“有类型/可重构”的 token 引用，不会退化成到处写字符串。

---

_**User (2026-02-16 18:23:05Z)**_

style token 不应该在 rich-editor 包导出，应该在一个子包 rich-style-token 导出

---

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 18:27:32Z)**_

这个边界我同意，应该抽成独立包 `@shiro/rich-style-token`，`rich-editor` 只消费不导出 token。

建议这样落地：

1. 新建 `packages/rich-style-token`  
`src/vars.css.ts` 用 `createGlobalThemeContract` 定义稳定变量名（`rc-text`、`rc-bg`、`rc-border`...），并导出 `vars`。  
这样 `*.css.ts` 有类型，`*.css` 也能直接写 `var(--rc-text)`。

2. `rich-editor` 迁移为消费者  
把 `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/vars.css.ts` 里的 contract 删除，改为 `import { vars } from '@shiro/rich-style-token'`，仅保留 `createTheme(vars, ...)` 的 light/dark/article/comment/note 主题类。  
同时从 `packages/rich-editor/src/styles/index.ts` 和 `packages/rich-editor/src/index.ts` 去掉 `vars` 的导出。

3. renderer 统一改为依赖 token 包  
`*.css.ts` 直接 import `vars`；`*.css` 用稳定 `--rc-*`。  
并在各 renderer 的 `package.json`/`vite.config.ts` 增加 `@shiro/rich-style-token` 依赖与 external。

4. 清理主题逻辑  
移除 `prefers-color-scheme` / `.dark`，只跟随 `RichRenderer` 的 theme class。  
顺带把 `ALERT_COLORS` / `BANNER_COLORS` 这类 TSX 内联硬编码也迁到 token 驱动。

这个方案比“从 rich-editor re-export token”更干净，包职责更稳定，DX 也不会退化成到处写字符串。  
如果你要，我可以下一步直接把 `rich-style-token` 包脚手架和首批迁移（`rich-editor` + `alert/banner/gallery/mermaid`）一次性做掉。
